desc: Set in a steep Pyrenean valley, Andorra la Vella combines mountain scenery with a compact capital center known for shopping, spa culture, and quick access to hiking and ski terrain. Visit for fresh alpine air, modern Caldea wellness facilities, and easy day trips to Romanesque villages and high passes.
hls: Duty-free shopping streets on Avinguda Meritxell
Caldea thermal spa complex in nearby Escaldes
Fast access to Vallnord and Grandvalira ski areas
Romanesque churches and stone hamlets nearby
Excellent base for hiking, biking, and scenic drives

todo.name: Stroll Avinguda Meritxell and old quarter
todo.desc: Pair Andorra’s modern shopping spine with the small Barri Antic around Plaça del Poble for a quick sense of old and new capital life.

todo.name: Caldea thermal spa session
todo.desc: Book a multi-hour circuit of indoor and outdoor lagoons, saunas, and hydrotherapy pools in one of Europe’s largest mountain spa complexes.

todo.name: Visit Casa de la Vall
todo.desc: Tour the former parliamentary house to understand Andorra’s co-principality system and centuries of local governance.

todo.name: Hike Rec del Solà and Rec de l’Obac paths
todo.desc: These balcony trails above town give easy panoramic walks over the valley without needing a long transfer.

todo.name: Day trip to Ordino valley
todo.desc: Head north to stone villages, the Sorteny area, and mountain viewpoints for a quieter, traditional side of Andorra.

todo.name: Winter ski day at Vallnord Pal-Arinsal
todo.desc: Use the short transfer from the capital for a full day of beginner-to-intermediate pistes and mountain dining.

wifi.note: Solid in hotels and ski apartments; mountain roads and remote valleys can have patchy mobile data.

prac.fltNote: No commercial airport in Andorra; fly to Barcelona (BCN) or Toulouse (TLS) then continue by bus or rental car (about 3–4 hours).
prac.visa: Andorra is outside Schengen but accessed via France/Spain; most US/UK/EU travelers can visit up to 90 days visa-free.
alerts: Winter snow can require chains or winter tires on mountain approaches.

sweet: June to September is best for hikes and mountain scenery; December to March is ideal for ski-focused trips.
